name: Familjens Räddning ("Save the Family" Herring Platter)
recipeIngredient: 2 Eggs, hard-cooked, whites and yolks finely chopped separately
1 small Cucumber, peeled, halved, seeded and finely chopped
1/2 cup Pickled beets, canned or fresh, finely chopped (see recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the herring fillets side by side on a long chilled platter.
2. With a sharp, heavy knife, make diagonal cuts 1/2 inch apart through both fillets.
3. Spread the sour cream (or sour cream and mayo combo) in a circle around the herring fillets.
4. On the border of the platter, arrange alternate mounds of chopped egg white, chopped egg yolk, cucumbers, beets, and parsley.
